title: Justin Trudeau makes TikTok dancing debut in Katy Perry’s ‘Watch It Burn’ video
summary_full: Justin Trudeau made a surprise dancing appearance in Katy Perry's TikTok video.  The former Canadian Prime Minister joined the singer and her team for a brief moment.  This playful cameo promoted Perry's new song, Watch It Burn, during her tour.  The couple, linked since July 2025, has made several public appearances together.  Trudeau's unexpected participation garnered significant attention across social media platforms.
